ref: But you have surely seen and heard how this man Paul is upsetting a lot of people, not only in Ephesus, but almost everywhere in Asia. He claims that the gods we humans make are not really gods at all.
text: K…õl…õ n…Ēm…ĒŐÄ p…õ n…ĒoluŐÉ kana g…õ Paulo any…õ al…õ etsyina banun…Ē ekpe…Ėekpe…Ėe…õ m…õ, p…õ agbana ban…ĒkpekpeŐÄ…õ atsa…Ėak…õ idzo n…õ Efoso…Ē n…õŐÄ Asia b…Ēd…ĒŐÉ m…õ petee tsy…õ. A…Ė…Ē as…õ ibudi…õ g…õ ban…Ēdzyrame…õ abh…õt…õ tinu akaa nanaŐÄ.
translated: And it happened that while Apollos was at Corinth, Paul passed through the upper regions and came to Ephesus, and finding some disciples he said to them. And when they heard this, they were baptized in the name of the Lord Jesus.

ref: You must tell everyone what you have seen and heard.
text: W…ĒbodziŐÄ an…Ē g…õ …Ēb…Ē…Ė…Ēa…Ė…Ē …Ēdal…õ y…õishu …Ēk…Ē banun…Ē petee n…õ k…õg…õ …Ēm…Ē p…õ oluŐÉ…Ē shu.
translated: They will come and take the child to the farm to show him/her the way of farming.
